mapper.select: select id, object_type, name, api_name, title, type, biz_type, expression, trigger_expr, virtual_expr, write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr from baseapp_object_field where object_type = #{objectType}

select id, object_type, name, api_name, title, type, biz_type, expression, trigger_expr, virtual_expr, write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr from baseapp_object_field where write_back_expr is not null
select id, object_type, name, api_name, title, type, biz_type, expression, trigger_expr, virtual_expr, write_back_expr::text as write_back_expr from baseapp_object_field
select content::text from baseapp_system_metadata where is_deleted = false
select app_name from baseapp_object_type where name = #{objectType} limit 1
